ANALYSIS
Regutation 18525 (copy enclosed) specifies the types of
expenditures which are considered to be j.n connection with a
future election and must be paid fron a bank account established
for that election. 
officeholder or other expenses related to
political, 
governmental, or legTislative activities not covered
under Regulation 18525 may be paid fron either a canpaign bank
account established for a current tenn of office or from a
campaigTn account established for election to a future term of the
sane office.
P1ease note that effective January 1, 1990, amendments to the
Act placed certain restrictions on the use of campaiqn funds.
(sections 85800-8580?, ) Enclosed is a fact sheet which summarizes
the new provisions.
If you have any additional questions please feel free to
contact this office at (915) 322-5662.
Sincerely,
Kathryn E. Donovan
